panel.title: BindHub
panel.description: BindHub now saves and runs hotkeys and macros with a Niri-first workflow inside Noctalia.

niri.title: Niri Actions
niri.description: Planned Niri-first window operations such as focus, move, float, center, and resize.

empty.hotkeys: No hotkeys have been configured yet.
empty.macros: No macros have been configured yet.

settings.summary: Configure hotkeys and macros for BindHub and save when you finish editing this section.

iconColor.label: Icon color
iconColor.description: Controls the bar widget accent color.

hotkeys.title: Hotkeys
hotkeys.empty: Create hotkeys here first. They will be persisted in plugin settings and later consumed by the execution backend.

name.label: Hotkey name
name.description: Short label to identify the automation entry.

trigger.label: Trigger
trigger.description: Record the key combination that should activate this entry later.

mode.label: Target mode
mode.description: Choose whether this trigger runs a direct action or a saved macro.

actionType.label: Action type
actionType.description: Current MVP stores the target action definition for a future backend.

payload.label: Action target
payload.description: Command, URL, or message depending on the selected action type.

macro.label: Macro
macro.description: Select which saved macro should run for this trigger.

enabled.label: Enabled state
enabled.description: Marks whether this hotkey should be considered active when the backend exists.

macros.title: Macros
macros.empty: No macros yet. A macro stores ordered actions that can later be attached to a hotkey.

name.label: Macro name
name.description: Name used in hotkey selection and panel summaries.

enabled.label: Enabled state
enabled.description: Marks whether this macro should be considered active by the future backend.

type.label: Action type
type.description: BindHub will execute these actions in order once the backend is connected.

value.label: Action value
value.description: Command, URL, or message associated with this action.
